The Arabic terms "الابت ١٨" (al-ibt 18), "باب ٤٠٠٠ الف" (bāb 4000 alf), and "٤٠٠٠ سدر تكليف" (4000 sidr taklīf) are translated literally, but their precise administrative or logistical meaning within the Antiquities Service context is unclear without further information.
